docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DANTE LEMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED MAY-10-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DANTE LEMAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
